title: Chuizhi Shijie: Dizhonghai Meishaonian

alternative_titles.ja: 垂直世界之地中海美少年

synopsis:
The "forbidden love" between elementary school students with incredibly long tails and large white dogs, the fairy tale world where axes fly horizontally, the cat-eared lady who travels less and less, dinosaurs with no volume kindergartens, animation studios that don't do animation—all of these things exist in the vertical world. This vertical world will feature all of these stories.

(Source: Bilibili)
